app.title: Vocabulary Quiz
app.finishedMessage: All verbs were completed. Nice work.

instructions.typeInstruction: ⌨️ Fill in the correct answer based on the prompt.
instructions.incorrectDot: ⚪ Gray dot = mistakes made, word repeats
instructions.hintDot: 🔴 Red dot = hint used, word repeats
instructions.hintMechanic: ❌ Wrong letters turn red. After 3 mistakes, a hint appears (red dot recorded).
instructions.worksheetIntro: 📝 Some German quizzes use their own worksheet layout split into sections.
instructions.worksheetCheck: ✅ Fill in a whole section and then check it with one button.
instructions.worksheetEnding: 🔤 In “Ergänze -e” tasks you choose whether to add “e” or nothing.
instructions.worksheetTranslate: ✍️ In translation tasks you enter the full phrase exactly as required.
instructions.worksheetRetry: 🔁 Wrong answers are highlighted so you can fix them right away.

gameplay.hintMessage: 💡 The correct letter is highlighted. Click it to continue.

englishQuiz1.title: English Quiz 1
englishQuiz1.description: Basic irregular verbs: run → ran, eat → ate, go → went

englishQuiz2.title: English Quiz 2
englishQuiz2.description: More irregular verbs: have → had, buy → bought, fly → flew

englishQuiz3.title: English Quiz 3
englishQuiz3.description: Mixed verbs including phrasal forms like wake up → woke up

germanAdjectives1.title: German Adjectives
germanAdjectives1.description: See the Czech meaning and type the German adjective

germanPossessiveArticles1.title: German Possessive Articles
germanPossessiveArticles1.description: Worksheet practice for mein/dein/sein/ihr/unser/euer based on the provided exercise

germanPossessiveTranslation1.title: German – Translate Quickly
germanPossessiveTranslation1.description: Worksheet practice for fast translation of possessive phrases from the provided exercise

worksheet.fillAllMessage: Fill in all answers in this section first.
worksheet.tryAgainMessage: {{count}} answers still need to be corrected.
worksheet.finishedMessage: You finished all sections of the new German quiz.
